_comment: CORS for the record bucket's browser presigned PUT/GET (Studio photo upload). The record bucket is deliberately NOT a CDK resource (no stack can delete the data), so this is applied out-of-band: aws s3api put-bucket-cors --bucket climbing-agent-db-backups-166832185275 --cors-configuration file://infra/record-bucket-cors.json. Update AllowedOrigins if the CloudFront domain changes.
